analysis:
The ride came up 69 minutes short of the planned 240-minute durability session — that's a significant execution gap, completing roughly 70% of the intended duration. Power and HR look appropriate for Z2 (IF 0.66, HR well below threshold), so the intensity was dialed in correctly; the issue is purely with time on bike. At 1964 kJ, the aerobic stimulus is meaningful but falls short of the durability adaptation the longer session was designed to deliver.

**Next session:** Prioritize completing the full duration over any other variable — if 240 minutes feels daunting, build toward it by targeting 210 minutes minimum, keeping the same conservative intensity.
